Create a Configurable Leaflet Base Map

Source: R/mysterycall_map_base.R
mysterycall_map_base.Rd

Build a Leaflet base map with sensible defaults for the mysterycall mapping helpers. The map includes multiple tile providers, a scale bar, optional title control, and centers on the continental United States by default.

Usage

mysterycall_map_base(title = NULL, lat = 39.8282, lng = -98.5795, zoom = 4)

Arguments

title

Optional HTML string used for a title control in the upper left corner of the map. Supply NULL or an empty string to omit the control.

lat, lng

Numeric latitude and longitude used to center the initial view. Defaults position the map over the continental United States.

zoom

Numeric zoom level passed to leaflet::setView().

Value

A leaflet::leaflet() map object pre-configured with controls and basemap layers.

See also

Other mapping: mysterycall_plot_density(), mysterycall_plot_isochrones(), mysterycall_create_isochrones(), mysterycall_isochrones_for_df(), mysterycall_plot_line(), mysterycall_plot_scatter(), mysterycall_map_acog_districts(), mysterycall_map_block_group(), mysterycall_map_leaflet(), mysterycall_map_physicians()

Examples

# \donttest{
mysterycall_map_base()


mysterycall_map_base("<strong>Custom title</strong>")


# }
